zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William de Heron於大約1350年出生在英國英格蘭達勒姆時，他的父親John Heron26歲，母親Mrs. John Heron37歲。他於1393年11月25日之前與Elizabeth de Say結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1404年10月30日享年55歲。

nameMeanings.name: Heron
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Herron  .
French (Héron): nickname for a tall, thin person, thought to resemble a heron (Old French hairon).

variants.name: Herron
meanings: English: habitational name from Harome (North Yorkshire), from Old English (æt thǣm) hārum ‘at the (gray) stones’, dative plural of hār ‘gray, stone’.

English and Scottish: nickname probably for a tall, thin man with long legs, from Old French hairon ‘heron’, Anglo-Norman French heron, Middle English heiroun, heyron, herne, heron. Compare Hearn and Heron .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from (Le) Héron in France (Seine-Maritime).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William de Heron was born about 1350, in Durham, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Heron, was 26 and his mother, Mrs. John Heron, was 37. He married Elizabeth de Say before 25 November 1393. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died on 30 October 1404, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William de Heron est né environ 1350, à Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Heron, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Mrs. John Heron, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth de Say avant 25 novembre 1393. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Il est décédé le 30 octobre 1404, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William de Heron um 1350 in Durham, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Heron 26 und seine Mutter Mrs. John Heron 37. Er hat vor 25. November 1393 Elizabeth de Say geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 30. Oktober 1404 im Alter von 55 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Heron è nato il circa 1350 nel Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Heron, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. John Heron, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth de Say prima del 25 novembre 1393. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì il 30 ottobre 1404, all'età di 55 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William de Heron(이)가 대략 1350년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Heron(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. John Heron(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1393년 11월 25일 이전 Elizabeth de Say(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1404년 10월 30일 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William de Heron nasceu aproximadamente 1350, em Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Heron, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. John Heron, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth de Say antes 25 de novembro de 1393. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 30 de outubro de 1404, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William de Heron родился около 1350 г. в местности дурам, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Heron было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. John Heron, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth de Say перед 25 ноябрь 1393 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер 30 октября 1404 г. в возрасте 55 лет.
